concerns.text: Tasks T033-T059 reference reviewer feedback (Rockmore, Kandel, Kahneman, Turing, Krakauer, West) that was NOT incorporated into spec.md or plan.md. These tasks lack FR/SC/US traceability tags. Per Constitution Principle IV, all work must trace to spec requirements. Either (a) add these reviewer concerns as formal FR/SC in spec.md, or (b) remove these tasks from tasks.md.

Task T030 references 'US-3' but the spec uses 'User Story 3' format. While semantically equivalent, inconsistent tag format may cause traceability tooling issues. Standardize to 'US-3' or 'User Story 3' consistently across all tasks.

Task T004 references 'FR-011' but also mentions 'Hanabi/CoQA' which the plan.md Dataset Constraint Acknowledgement states have NO verified URLs. Task should explicitly reference the synthetic fallback path (code/data/synthetic.py) rather than implying verified dataset availability.
